Travel✈️

Big Island, Hawaii

Posted by Wanyu Zhang on March 30, 2026

Hapuna Beach

The same beach with palms against a pueple and orange sky.

Kua Bay

A lone shade tree standing watch over the deep blue.

Puʻuhonua o Hōnaunau

Beautiful traditional crafts.

Punaluʻu Black Sand Beach

Black sand! and a green sea turtle went back home.

South Point

The southernmost point of the United States, its monument encrusted with offerings of coral.

ʻAkaka Falls

Mauna Kea

Above the clouds near the summit — the highest point on the island.
